turns.content: What brings you in today?
Well, my wife's been after me about this patch on my forehead. It's rough and scaly, been there about a year now. She said I ought to get it looked at.
When did this start?
I guess it was sometime last summer. Didn't pay it much mind at first, just figured it was dry skin or something from working out in the sun all day.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
It's right here, on my forehead. (points) Doesn't really hurt, maybe a little itchy sometimes. Mostly it's just rough, like sandpaper.
Have you had any fever or chills?
No, nothing like that. I feel fine otherwise. Just this spot on my forehead.
What medications are you currently taking?
I take a little white pill for my blood pressure, been on that for years. And sometimes one for my back when it acts up, but not every day.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
Just the blood pressure, far as I know. My back gives me trouble sometimes from the farm work, but that's not really a condition, just gets sore.
Are you allergic to any medications?
No, I don't think so. Never had a problem with any pills before.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
I just leave it alone mostly. My wife put some lotion on it once, but it didn't do much. Figured if it wasn't hurting, I'd just let it be.
Does anything make it better or worse?
Not really. Just stays the same whether I'm working or resting. Maybe gets a little more noticeable when I've been out in the sun all day.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
It doesn't bother me much. I still do my work, tend to the fields, all that. Just my wife nags me about it, so here I am.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
I quit smoking years ago. As for drinking, I'll have a couple beers after work, nothing heavy. Maybe two or three in the evening.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
I don't think so. My daddy had some spots on his arms, but he never went to the doctor for nothing. Can't say if it was the same or different.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
No, first time for something like this. I've had plenty of sunburns over the years, but they always healed up. This one just stayed.
I've explained quite a bit — does that make sense so far?
Yes, I understand. Whatever you think is best, doc.
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Physically, nothing really. Maybe a 1. And emotionally I'm fine, don't feel bothered by it. I'd say 2 at most.
Do you have any questions for me?
No, I don't think so. You're the doctor, so I'll trust whatever you say.
What do you think might be going on?
I don't rightly know, doc. That's why I came to you. My wife thought it might be something to worry about, but I'm not one to guess at these things.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
No, I think that's about it. You've got the whole story now.
